title: geum pinnatifidum
intro: Geum pinnatifidum, also known as the Cut-leaved Avens, is a flowering plant species within the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its herbal remedies, which can be used to address various health concerns.
